hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' < /dev/stdin); [[ "$FILE" == *.py ]] || exit 0; cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff check --fix "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; uv run ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'rm -rf|DROP TABLE|git push.*(-f|--force)' && echo 'BLOCK: destructive command' >&2 && exit 2 || true
